raw_consumer_statement: I was notified by my XXXX  XXXX bank that a charge of around XXXX dollars was blocked on XX/XX/year>. I found out the week of XX/XX/XXXX that American Express started a payment of XXXX. This was the balance due on the account. I contacted American Express and reported that I never initiated a payment. The representative told me it was started from the mobile app on XX/XX/XXXX. I informed the rep that I only used the card not start a payment on the app. The rep apologized and said they will start an investigation, but could not stop the return payment fee. I accepted that and asked for an email of the investigation or what was told to me. The rep said I would get an email. On XX/XX/XXXX I received another message that a charge of XXXX was blocked. I contacted American Express again, but this time a rep told me the system will try the payment XXXX  times and charge me each time. When I informed them about the investigation, but did not acknowledge or see that it was reported. They also " could not '' provide me a supervisor or remove the charges. My account with them is now negative and i haven't been able to speak with the dispute department since.
